<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print(f"Total nodes: {len(nodes)}")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] <= 20:
        center = None
        if n['boundary']:
            rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            center = (sum(rows)/len(rows), sum(cols)/len(cols))
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, center={center}, children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
